Here is the full review:

---

**PR #1180: Tweaks on crew monitor**
Author: CasaleBalthazar (StudMuffin) | +130 / -14 | 5 files

**What it does:**
Two crew monitor improvements: (1) crew members on the nav map now show their job icon instead of a generic green dot, and (2) the AI entity gets a "Warp" button per crew member to teleport its eye to that location.

---

**Security concern -- this is the big one:**
